title: Mass layoffs at Xbox and Bethesda threaten id Software, Elder Scrolls 6, and Perfect Dark
summary: The wave of cuts at ZeniMax studios leaves the Doom team decimated, cancels projects, and raises doubts about the future of Bethesda's anticipated RPG.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced arrives with good reviews but mired in controversy over layoffs and microtransactions
summary: The remake of the pirate title receives the best scores of the saga since 2013, but the layoffs at Ubisoft and the cash store tarnish the launch.

title: Call of Duty Black Ops and Black Ops 2 land on PS5 and PS4 without including their downloadable content
summary: The first Black Ops titles of the franchise are now available on Sony's current consoles, but each game costs $40 and does not include the DLCs.

title: Palworld launches its version 1.0 without raising the price and warns about the use of old mods
summary: The survival game reaches its official launch maintaining its price and asking players to remove previous modifications.

title: Sony and Bungie close the litigation with former Marathon director over a $200 million lawsuit
summary: Christopher Barrett, who was fired for alleged misconduct, reaches a financial agreement with the companies after months of legal battle.

title: Obsidian would be developing a new Fallout, according to reports from multiple sources
summary: The studio that created New Vegas would have been put in charge of a new installment of the saga, canceling other projects like the Avowed sequel.

title: Dragon Age creator declares the saga dead after the failure of Veilguard, but doesn't close the door to a return
summary: David Gaider and other series veterans believe it's unlikely that EA will continue the franchise, though they would be willing to revive it if the opportunity arises.

title: Sony plans to eliminate physical discs in 2028, causing concern in retail
summary: PlayStation's decision to go completely digital by the end of the decade is seen by experts as a hard blow for video game stores.

title: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma joins the Federal Reserve after laying off 3,200 employees
summary: The executive was appointed to lead a task force on employment and productivity days after announcing massive cuts in Microsoft's video game division.

title: Persona 4 Revival will modify the character Yosuke to adapt him to contemporary sensibilities
summary: The re-release of the classic Japanese RPG will adjust the personality of the popular companion to be more in line with current values.

title: Deltarune launches Chapter 5 on Switch and reveals a hidden conversation that connects the big mysteries
summary: The new update of Toby Fox's RPG includes additional content and a secret scene that ties up narrative loose ends.

title: GTA Online prepares for the most ambitious heist in years, the first since 2020
summary: Grand Theft Auto V's multiplayer mode will receive a new large-scale heist, scheduled for the coming weeks.

title: Destiny 2 receives a farewell gift from Bungie as it enters maintenance mode
summary: The studio gifts players with a final present as the game moves into a reduced support phase.

title: Stardew Valley announces an official crochet book and a mod that turns it into a 3D game with virtual reality
summary: The successful farm simulator expands its universe with a crafts manual and a mod that adds three-dimensional depth and VR support.

title: Forza Horizon 6 guides: treasure locations, scenic routes, and automotive events
summary: Various articles detail how to find hidden treasures, enjoy the landscapes of Japan, and participate in the game's Car Meet.

title: Counter-Strike 2 modifies its rules and introduces a map where dogs are rescued instead of hostages
summary: Valve updates the shooter with new changes to gameplay mechanics and an alternative scenario that replaces hostages with animals.

title: Disgaea Mayhem presents a demo and shows first impressions of the tactical RPG
summary: The new project from the Disgaea producer now has a demo available, with an initial positive reception from fans.

title: Brigandine: Abyss confirms a demo on Switch 2 starting July 30
summary: The strategic RPG will be available to try on Nintendo's console in the coming weeks.

title: Sword Art Online: Echoes of Aincrad finally adapts the classic arc and announces its release date
summary: The new RPG based on the anime will take players to the iconic Aincrad, with a faithful story and a confirmed release date.

title: Subnautica 2 reaches 5 million copies and responds to community requests
summary: The ocean survival game celebrates its success in early access, but its creators remain firm in not crossing a certain red line requested by fans.
